rationale: The skill is centered on writing CloudFormation templates (YAML/JSON) and invoking the AWS CLI for stack operations, so the agent will read/write template files in the working directory and shell out to the `aws` binary. AWS CLI calls reach CloudFormation regional endpoints under amazonaws.com and rely on credentials at ~/.aws/. No deletions of local files are implied — `delete-stack` operates on remote AWS resources, not local filesystem paths.
